overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style game showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves along a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing massive digital billboards and sparse pedestrians, then crosses an intersection with futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with digital advertising displays

events.description: pedestrian in dark clothing walks past camera from right to left, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: walking past camera in opposite direction wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway ramp with yellow safety barriers and support columns
large illuminated vertical billboard displaying health warning text with anatomical imagery
row of concrete and metal barriers with yellow accents separating sidewalk from street
tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents against night sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway in a futuristic city at night. Massive digital billboards illuminate the right side while concrete barriers line the left. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the camera moves steadily forward through the neon-lit environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching major urban intersection with traffic control

events.description: pedestrian in white shirt walks toward camera and passes by closely on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the sidewalk approaching the intersection with increasing pedestrian presence

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and dark shorts walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: tall traffic control pole with speed limit 40 sign and illuminated pedestrian signals

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk as the environment opens slightly approaching an intersection. The large health warning billboard falls behind while a traffic light pole comes into view ahead. Pedestrians walk toward the camera, including one in a white shirt who passes closely by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk with active vehicle traffic

events.description: steps off concrete sidewalk onto striped crosswalk to begin crossing the street
black sports car drives past from left to right through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street at the intersection while observing passing traffic and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sports car driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: concrete multi-level parking structure with illuminated advertisements on the facade
tall vertical red illuminated billboard displaying advertisements on building ahead

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the sheltered sidewalk onto the open crosswalk to cross the intersection. The ground changes to striped asphalt as vehicles including a black sports car pass through. A multi-story parking garage becomes visible on the left while tall red digital billboards dominate the view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection corner with parking garage and pedestrian plaza area

events.description: multiple vehicles including a dark sedan pass through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: continuing across the intersection toward the parking garage area with moderate foot traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green pants and jacket standing near the crosswalk edge

segments.scene_description: Completing the street crossing and approaching the opposite corner dominated by a multi-story parking garage. The elevated highway structure recedes behind while vehicles continue to pass through the intersection. The red digital billboards ahead grow larger as the camera approaches the building facade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered urban corridor into a wide, neon-lit city intersection. It begins along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, moving past concrete barriers and massive digital billboards that cast a neon glow over sparse pedestrians. As the camera advances, the sheltered environment opens up toward a traffic light, with the large health warning billboard receding as a pedestrian in a white shirt passes closely by. The scene then shifts from the sidewalk onto a striped asphalt crosswalk, where the view expands to reveal passing black sports cars and a multi-story parking garage to the left. Finally, the camera completes the crossing and moves toward the opposite corner, leaving the highway structure behind as towering red digital billboards dominate the facade of the approaching building.
